description: Flashcards for measuring how many distinct alternative answers (excluding case-only changes) the AI checker accepts per question.

cards.front: What organelle is the powerhouse of the cell?
Common biochemical name for the Na+/K+ pump?
During depolarization, the membrane potential does what?
What is the cell's main energy currency molecule?
The Krebs cycle is also known as?
What is the functional filtering unit of the kidney?
